name: urtica dioica
mechanism: Evidence suggests anti-inflammatory activity and possible effects on cytokine signaling; clinical evidence remains mixed by indication.
effects: adjunct symptom support in some inflammatory conditions
nutritive tonic use in traditional practice
No direct effects data. Contextual inference:

contraindications: use caution with antihypertensives and diuretics
